personalizedSubjectLine: Following up: Health eRecords - Seed Round
personalizedPitchEmail:
Hi Paige,

Hope this finds you well. I'm following up on our last exchange regarding Health eRecords.

Outlander VC funds founders with outlandish visions changing everything. Health eRecords offers a significant shift for private medical practices: our HIPAA-compliant EHR platform automates patient intake, streamlines charting, and integrates medical billing, saving doctors 10+ hours of admin work each week. We're building a new standard for operational efficiency in this sector.

We're actively engaged in our seed round. Are you open to a quick 15-minute chat to share more about our progress next week?
personalizedProposal: Private medical practices struggle with inefficient, time-consuming administrative tasks, leading to physician burnout and hindering patient focus. Health eRecords offers a HIPAA-compliant EHR platform that automates patient intake, streamlines charting, integrates billing, and connects to labs via HL7, saving doctors over 10 hours of admin work weekly. By directly addressing this pain point with a comprehensive solution, we are positioned to capture a significant share of the private practice market, driving improved healthcare delivery and substantial value creation.
